message:
perf(pager,wal,btree): Vec pre-sizing audit + epoch map GC (bd-9n3jz, bd-vn2ea)

Eliminate RawVecInner::finish_grow hotspots by pre-sizing Vecs where
the capacity is known or estimable:

- btree balance: all_cells, sibling_types, old_right_children,
  new_dividers, distribution, kept_cells, cell_offsets (7 sites)
- WAL native_commit: drain_committed, append_markers_and_fsync2,
  derive_proof_object_id (3 sites)
- WAL cell_delta_commit: build_cell_delta_frames via size_hint (1 site)

Also adds GroupCommitQueue::prune_stale_epoch_metadata to evict
failed_epochs/persisted_epochs entries older than 128 epochs,
preventing unbounded map growth under sustained group commit traffic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
